purpose: Planning-only governance register for future Adaptive User Insight summaries: define how WellFit may later use privacy-preserving aggregate signals to recommend mission, buddy, difficulty, challenge, and internal reward-tuning ideas without exposing raw user data to agents or changing runtime product logic.
scope: Documentation, registry, and validation-only governance. This register does not activate live tracking, data collection, personalization runtime, reward authority, or protected compliance logic.
allowedAggregateSignals: aggregate anonymous cohort-level mission completion rates
aggregate anonymous cohort-level mission abandonment rates
aggregate anonymous cohort-level difficulty distribution bands
aggregate anonymous cohort-level buddy interaction counts by category
aggregate anonymous cohort-level feature usage counts by route or module
aggregate anonymous cohort-level challenge participation counts
aggregate anonymous cohort-level feedback tags that were manually reviewed and redacted before aggregation
aggregate anonymous cohort-level accessibility preference counts
aggregate anonymous cohort-level onboarding friction categories
aggregate anonymous cohort-level reward-balance issue categories without ledger, wallet, payment, token, or user-level evidence
forbiddenRawSensitiveFields: raw user messages unless manually reviewed and redacted
names, emails, user IDs, device IDs, account IDs, handles, or personal identifiers
exact location, GPS traces, addresses, coordinates, routes, or check-in history
health data, watch data, workout details, heart rate, sleep, nutrition, disability, injury, or medical-adjacent data
child/minor data, age-verification records, school data, guardian data, or youth safety records
camera, face, biometric or raw sensor data, AR camera frames, photos, video, audio, gait, motion traces, or raw accelerometer/gyroscope data
medical claims, diagnosis, treatment, therapy, or clinical recommendations
payment/token/wallet data, purchase records, payout records, NFT ownership, staking, presale, trading, or financial-equivalent data
exact daily routine that could identify a person, including precise commute, work, school, home, sleep, or movement patterns
reward authority evidence, anti-cheat evidence, final ledger writes, rare-item grants, or mission-completion proof tied to a user

personalizationDimensions.allowedOutput: suggested backlog theme emphasis for human review

personalizationDimensions.allowedInput: cohort-level interaction counts for quiz, story, reflection, and micro-learning formats
cohort-level completion and abandonment rates by difficulty band
cohort-level redacted feedback tags and interaction category counts
personalizationDimensions.allowedOutput: planning-only buddy tone and help-style recommendation

personalizationDimensions.allowedInput: cohort-level challenge participation and opt-out counts

allowed: Recommend backlog changes to mission themes using only aggregate cohorts above minimum sample thresholds.
Suggest lowering, raising, or splitting difficulty bands only as planning recommendations with explanation and human review.
Flag unclear aggregate signals for research-recommendation review instead of creating runtime personalization.
forbidden: No per-user mission targeting, live tracking, location-based personalization, or client-side completion authority.
No use of raw mission evidence, raw movement traces, raw user messages, or exact daily routines.
No final reward, XP, anti-cheat, ledger, or mission-completion decisions.

allowed: Recommend aggregate buddy tone, onboarding help, or explanation style changes for human review.
Use only redacted feedback tags and anonymous interaction category counts above minimum sample thresholds.
Keep all recommendations explainable and reversible.
forbidden: No raw chat logs, raw user messages, health inferences, child/minor data, medical claims, or sensitive personal profiling.
No personalized emotional manipulation, diagnosis, therapy, or high-impact decisioning.
No exposure of agent-visible data that can identify a person.

allowed: Compare aggregate completion and abandonment rates across difficulty bands.
Recommend a conservative difficulty-band adjustment when thresholds and explainability requirements are met.
Keep recommendations draft-only until reviewed and implemented through existing mission architecture.
forbidden: No direct runtime difficulty changes from the register.
No tuning based on protected attributes or sensitive data.

allowed: Flag aggregate challenge pacing or internal reward-balance concerns as planning-only recommendations.
Recommend review of internal points/XP balance without changing final ledger authority.
Use existing economy guardrails and require human review for anything reward-adjacent.
forbidden: No token, NFT, wallet, payment, betting, purchase, payout, staking, presale, trading, or marketplace activation.
No final reward authority, anti-cheat decisions, rare-item grants, inventory unlocks, or ledger writes.
No challenge outcome manipulation or financial-equivalent personalization.

fairnessAndSafetyRules: Use aggregate cohorts only; never expose raw user data or raw identifiers to agents.
Do not create or infer protected classes, health status, child/minor status, exact location, biometric identity, financial status, or medical conditions.
Require human review for high or critical impact, reward-adjacent, privacy-adjacent, compliance-adjacent, or fairness-sensitive recommendations.
Prefer conservative recommendations; when aggregate signals conflict, choose no-change and request review.
Document known limitations, sample sizes, and excluded sensitive signals in every summary.
Keep the framework planning_only until a separate privacy, consent, data-retention, and server-authority review explicitly approves any implementation.

minimumSampleThresholds.smallCohortAction: Do not generate a recommendation; report insufficient aggregate sample and request more reviewed aggregate data.
minimumSampleThresholds.kAnonymityRule: No agent-visible summary may represent fewer than 30 users or a smaller cohort than the stricter category threshold.

explainabilityRequirements: State the aggregate signal categories used and cite the source register or report path.
State sample size, cohort window, threshold result, and excluded sensitive fields.
Explain why the recommendation is planning-only and whether runtime implementation is allowed or blocked.
List risks, fairness considerations, known limitations, and protected areas not touched.
Provide a reversible next safe task that extends existing mapped files only.

humanReviewRequiredTriggers.trigger: Any high-risk, privacy-adjacent, fairness-sensitive, protected-topic-adjacent, or reward-adjacent recommendation.
humanReviewRequiredTriggers.requiredAction: Human review required before implementation; keep implementationAllowed=false.

humanReviewRequiredTriggers.trigger: Any recommendation touching token, NFT, wallet, payment, betting, final reward authority, anti-cheat, health, child/minor, exact location, camera, biometric, medical, legal, privacy, or compliance areas.
humanReviewRequiredTriggers.requiredAction: Stop and request explicit owner approval and review plan; do not implement.

humanReviewRequiredTriggers.trigger: Minimum sample thresholds are not met or aggregate evidence is ambiguous.
humanReviewRequiredTriggers.requiredAction: No-change recommendation and human review required.

recommendationSchema.recommendedChangeType: mission | buddy | difficulty | challenge | internal_reward_balance | no_change

humanMotivationEngineBoundary.rule: Adaptive insight may reference motivation dimensions only as planning categories; no raw identifiers, protected data, runtime personalization, reward authority, or mission authority.

ethicalEngagementGuardBoundary.summary: Ethical engagement, age-appropriate design, recovery/pause, Buddy tone, mission/reward/social/website/sponsor/monetization, and protected-data boundaries must be checked before runtime implementation.
ethicalEngagementGuardBoundary.reviewRequired: Health, child/minor, family/guardian, location, camera, face, biometric, motion, consent, privacy, token, wallet, payment, payout, betting, reward-authority, mission-authority, sponsor, monetization, legal, and compliance behavior remains review_required.

adaptiveDifficultyAgentBoundary.rule: Adaptive difficulty may consume only aggregate-safe or explicit planning-safe insight categories and cannot enable runtime personalization, protected-data profiling, reward authority, or mission-completion authority.

multisensoryLearningEngineReference.boundary: No runtime learning personalization, protected-data profiling, AR/Unity behavior, reward authority, or mission-completion authority is enabled.

productIntelligenceAgentBoundary.purpose: May use aggregate insight summaries for product briefs only; no runtime personalization, profiling, or protected inference.

missionFactoryAgentBoundary.allowedUse: Aggregate, minimized insight summaries may inform report-only mission planning questions.
missionFactoryAgentBoundary.forbiddenUse: No raw identifiers, individual targeting, runtime mission generation, completion authority, reward authority, protected-data inference, or location/camera/health/child/privacy/legal behavior.

healthyRetentionAgentBoundary.boundary: Healthy Retention may consume only aggregate/planning insight summaries for report-only wellbeing review; no individual-user profiling, runtime personalization, notifications, streak/reward changes, mission/reward authority, or protected-data decisions.

approvedAgentBuildReferences.name: User Memory Governance Agent Report Agent
approvedAgentBuildReferences.note: Reference recorded in project-register/adaptive-user-insights.json; report-only governance evidence, no runtime/protected authority granted.

approvedAgentBuildReferences.name: Recovery / Pause / Anti-Overuse Guard Report Agent
approvedAgentBuildReferences.note: Reference recorded in project-register/adaptive-user-insights.json; report-only governance evidence, no runtime/protected authority granted.
